title: rubus vestitus subsp. dasyclados
intro: Rubus vestitus subsp. dasyclados, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a subspecies of bramble native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its edible fruits and medicinal properties. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus vestitus subsp. dasyclados include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Rubus vestitus subsp. dasyclados can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
